positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration featuring a central, symmetrical arrangement of elegant jungle fauna and flora, such as stylized hummingbirds, abstract monstera leaves, and celestial crescent moons. The style should be a mix of clean linework and vibrant Art Nouveau patterns, resembling sophisticated vector art. Use a limited, deep color palette of midnight blue, teal, iridescent gold, and deep emerald green. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed for seamless repetition or placement on apparel. Focus on clean silhouettes, intricate negative space, and strong decorative flow. High detail, graphic quality, symmetrical composition, vector style.
